tracks.rawText: 4:23Te_pienso_-_Belari_Video_Oficial_f-49XroBPDsv5CoverStarts with deep, syncopated reggae bass and tight, offbeat guitar chops over a laid-back drum groove, Layers of delay-drenched percussion, vocal samples, and swirling synth stabs echo through the mix, Tech dub textures build with evolving filter sweeps and a pulsing kick, letting the track morph while maintaining a rootsy backboneJulye1PublishRemix
